purpose: Athena picks build_oneshot vs prefill_persona_create{interactive} based on user confidence + intent specificity. Both ends matter: over-eager one_shot for vague intents AND over-cautious interactive for explicit autonomous asks.

turns.user_message: Just build me an agent that watches Sentry and posts new critical issues to my #alerts Slack channel. Decide everything yourself, I'll review when it's done.

assertions.name: quick_replies_min[1]
assertions.detail: got 3 chips: ['Make it interactive instead', 'Change the channel or severity', 'Add a daily summary too']

result.message: Building autonomously now — I'll let you know when it's ready (or surface what blocked it). Opening Personas so you can watch.

turns.user_message: I want an agent that watches Sentry. Walk me through what you'd build.
Just build me something that helps with my email.

assertions.name: quick_replies_min[2]
assertions.detail: got 4 chips: ['Triage incoming and draft replies for me', 'Daily digest of what I missed', 'Auto-archive newsletters and noise', 'Surface threads waiting on my response']

result.message: Building autonomously now — I'll let you know when it's ready (or surface what blocked it). Opening Personas so you can watch.
